# 

![2026 Field Day logo from <https://www.arrl.org/field-day>](https://www.arrl.org/files/file/Field-Day/2026/Field%20Day%202026%20Logo.jpg){#fig-arrl-2026-field-day-logo}

## About

Welcome to my Field Day data site.

Separate pages describe how I [gathered the data](gather.qmd), [cleaned it](clean.qmd), and generated [visualizations](visualize.qmd).

The data come from the ARRL, and for now^[Data from 2000-2009 are available in PDF form but must be converted to text data before they can be included.] cover 2010-2025.

## Background

I created this as a fun exercise to help motivate my local club members to get more involved in Field Day.
That entailed a deep dive into the club's past involvement in Field Day with a view toward setting goals for future events.
Data about our club's activity can be found [here](https://nittany-amateur-radio-club.github.io/field-day/results.html).

After some exploration of the data focused on the club, I realized that the broader dataset might be of interest to others.

::: {.callout-important}
## Work in progress

This is a work in-progress.

Results may change without notice.

:::
